relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.title: WELSH - What are RLEs and ORPs?
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.line1: WELSH - A relevant legal entity (RLE) is a corporate body or firm that can legally act as a PSC.
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.line2: WELSH - An other registrable person (ORP) is a non-corporate entity or office that can legally act as a PSC. This can be:
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.bullet1: WELSH - a corporation sole - a single incorporated office occupied by one person, such as Lord Mayor of London
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.bullet2: WELSH - a government or government department of a country, a territory, or a part of a country or territory
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.bullet3: WELSH - an international organisation whose members include two or more countries or territories (or their governments)
relevantLegalEntityAndOtherRegistrablePe.bullet4: WELSH - a local authority or local government body in the UK or elsewhere

tellUsAboutPscPage.title: WELSH - Tell us about people with significant control (PSCs)
tellUsAboutPscPage.whatWeAsk: WELSH - We'll ask you if the partnership will have any PSCs on registration. If it will, you need to tell us about them.
tellUsAboutPscPage.addingMoreAfter: WELSH - After the partnership is registered, you'll need to file a paper form if you need to add any more PSCs.
tellUsAboutPscPage.psc: WELSH - A person with significant control (PSC) is someone who owns or controls the partnership. They do this by meeting one or more conditions known as 'natures of control'.
tellUsAboutPscPage.shareOfAssets: WELSH - more than 25% share of assets
tellUsAboutPscPage.votingRights: WELSH - more than 25% ownership of voting rights
tellUsAboutPscPage.rights: WELSH - the right to appoint or remove management
tellUsAboutPscPage.influence: WELSH - significant influence or control over the partnership
tellUsAboutPscPage.firmOrTrust: WELSH - They can also be a PSC if they have significant control over a firm or trust that meets any of these natures of control.
tellUsAboutPscPage.pscType: WELSH - A PSC can be an individual person, a relevant legal entity (RLE) or an other registrable person (ORP).
tellUsAboutPscPage.guidance: WELSH - read the guidance on PSCs of Scottish limited partnerships (opens in new tab).

willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.title: WELSH - Will the partnership have PSCs on registration?
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.optionYes: WELSH - Yes, at least one person will count as a PSC in relation to the partnership. This may be an individual, a relevant legal entity (RLE) or an other registrable person (ORP)
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.optionNo: WELSH - No, there is no person identified as a PSC in relation to the limited partnership
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.errorMessage: WELSH - Select if the partnership will have any PSCs on registration
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.publicRegisterLine1: WELSH - We'll show this information on the public register.

whichTypePage.title: WELSH - Which type of person with significant control (PSC) do you need to add?
whichTypePage.hint: WELSH - You can add more later.
whichTypePage.errorMessage: WELSH - Select which type of PSC you need to add

commonEntityFields.governingLaw: WELSH - What governing law does it operate under?
commonEntityFields.governingLawHint: WELSH - For example, the Companies Act 2006.
commonEntityFields.legalFormOrCorporateIdentity: WELSH - What is its legal form or corporate identity?
commonEntityFields.legalFormOrCorporateIdentityHint: WELSH - This is the corporate body type. For example, private limited company.
commonEntityFields.publicRegisterLine1: WELSH - We'll show all of this information on the public register.

addRelevantLegalEntity.title: WELSH - Add a relevant legal entity PSC
addRelevantLegalEntity.legalEntityName: WELSH - What is the relevant legal entity (RLE)'s name?
addRelevantLegalEntity.whichRegister: WELSH - Which register is it entered in? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.whichRegisterHint: WELSH - For example, the Register of Companies UK.
addRelevantLegalEntity.countryRegistered: WELSH - Which country is it registered in? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.registrationNumber: WELSH - What is the registration number? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.registrationNumberHint: WELSH - For example, the company number.

addOtherRegistrablePerson.title: WELSH - Add an other registrable person PSC
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalEntityName: WELSH - What is the other registrable person (ORP)'s name?

addIndividualPerson.title: WELSH - Add a PSC (individual person)
addIndividualPerson.consent: WELSH - This person knows their details are being supplied as part of this application
addIndividualPerson.personTitle: WELSH - Professional or honorary title (if relevant)
addIndividualPerson.personTitleHint: WELSH - For example, Dr or Professor
addIndividualPerson.secondNationality: WELSH - What is their second nationality (if relevant)?
addIndividualPerson.secondNationalityHint: WELSH - Dual citizenship (also known as dual nationality) is allowed in some countries. This means you can be a citizen of your own country and another country.
addIndividualPerson.publicRegisterLine1: WELSH - We'll show the month and year of the PSC's date of birth, but not the exact date.
addIndividualPerson.publicRegisterLine2: WELSH - We'll show all the other information you provide on this screen on the public register.

whichTypeOfNatureOfControlPage.publicRegisterInformationLine1: WELSH - We'll show this information on the public register.

relevantLegalEntity.title: WELSH - How does this RLE hold control over the limited partnership?

individual.text: WELSH - As a relevant legal entity (RLE)
individual.hint: WELSH - The RLE meets one or more natures of control

firm.hint: WELSH - The RLE has control over a firm that meets one or more natures of control

trust.hint: WELSH - The RLE has control over a trust that meets one or more natures of control

otherRegistrablePerson.title: WELSH - How does this ORP hold control over the limited partnership?

individual.text: WELSH - As an other registrable person (ORP)
individual.hint: WELSH - The ORP meets one or more natures of control

firm.hint: WELSH - The ORP has control over a firm that meets one or more natures of control

trust.hint: WELSH - The ORP has control over a trust that meets one or more natures of control

individualPerson.title: WELSH - How does this individual hold control over the limited partnership?

individual.hint: WELSH - The individual meets one or more natures of control

firm.hint: WELSH - The individual has control over a firm that meets one or more natures of control

trust.hint: WELSH - The individual has control over a trust that meets one or more natures of control

addNatureOfControlPage.publicRegisterInformationLine1: WELSH - We'll show this information on the public register.
addNatureOfControlPage.moreThan25LessThan50: WELSH - more than 25% but not more than 50%
addNatureOfControlPage.moreThan50LessThan75: WELSH - more than 50% but not more than 75%
addNatureOfControlPage.ownershipOfRightToAppointOrRemove: WELSH - Ownership of right to appoint or remove management
addNatureOfControlPage.selectOwnershipHint: WELSH - Select if this statement applies
addNatureOfControlPage.selectSigInfluenceHint: WELSH - Only select this statement if the other natures of control do not apply

individual.title: WELSH - What is the individual's nature of control?
individual.titleHint: WELSH - You've told us that the individual meets one or more natures of control.
individual.shareOfAssetsHint: WELSH - The individual holds (directly or indirectly) the right to the following percentage of surplus assets of the partnership on a winding up:
individual.votingRightsHint: WELSH - The individual holds (directly or indirectly) the following percentage of voting rights in the limited partnership:
individual.ownershipCheckboxText: WELSH - The individual holds, directly or indirectly, the right to appoint or remove a majority of the persons entitled to take part in the management of the limited partnership.
individual.sigInfluenceCheckboxText: WELSH - The individual has the right to exercise, or actually exercises, significant influence or control over the limited partnership.

firm.title: WELSH - What is the firm's nature of control?
firm.titleHint: WELSH - You've told us that the individual has control over a firm that meets one or more natures of control.
firm.shareOfAssetsHint: WELSH - The members of the firm hold (directly or indirectly) the right to the following percentage of surplus assets of the partnership on a winding up:
firm.votingRightsHint: WELSH - The members of the firm hold (directly or indirectly) the following percentage of voting rights in the limited partnership:
firm.ownershipCheckboxText: WELSH - The members of the firm hold, directly or indirectly, the right to appoint or remove a majority of the persons entitled to take part in the management of the limited partnership.
firm.sigInfluenceCheckboxText: WELSH - The members of the firm have the right to exercise, or actually exercises, significant influence or control over the limited partnership.

trust.title: WELSH - What is the trust's nature of control?
trust.titleHint: WELSH - You've told us that the individual has control over a trust that meets one or more natures of control.
trust.shareOfAssetsHint: WELSH - The trustees of the trust hold (directly or indirectly) the right to the following percentage of surplus assets of the partnership on a winding up:
trust.votingRightsHint: WELSH - The trustees of the trust hold (directly or indirectly) the following percentage of voting rights in the limited partnership:
trust.ownershipCheckboxText: WELSH - The trustees of the trust hold, directly or indirectly, the right to appoint or remove a majority of the persons entitled to take part in the management of the limited partnership.
trust.sigInfluenceCheckboxText: WELSH - The trustees of the trust have the right to exercise, or actually exercises, significant influence or control over the limited partnership.

removePscPage.title: WELSH - Are you sure you want to remove

reviewPage.title: WELSH - Review the people with significant control (PSCs) for this partnership
reviewPage.personsAdded: WELSH - PSC's you have added so far:

addAnotherPersonWithSignificantControl.title: WELSH - Do you need to add another PSC?
addAnotherPersonWithSignificantControl.addRelevantLegalEntity: WELSH - Yes, a relevant legal entity (RLE)
addAnotherPersonWithSignificantControl.addOtherRegistrablePerson: WELSH - Yes, an other registrable person (ORP)

errorMessage.beforeName: WELSH - You must provide all information for
errorMessage.afterName: WELSH - before continuing. Select Change to provide more information
errorMessage.noOptionSelected: WELSH - Select if you need to add another PSC
